rankings.name: Favori De Champdou
key_positive_factors: Strong recent form (11-21)
Top-tier Jockey/Trainer combination (Kennedy/Elliott)
Suitability for Good to Soft conditions
key_risks: First attempt at the specialized Cross Country course discipline

rankings.name: Stumptown
key_positive_factors: Progressive profile with recent win
Low weight/OR advantage relative to class leaders
Consistent performer at Cheltenham
key_risks: Stepping up in tactical complexity for this specific chase

rankings.name: Vanillier
key_positive_factors: High-class staying power (Grand National runner-up)
Gavin Cromwell's excellent stable form
Class drop from Grade 1/Handicap primary targets
key_risks: Often finishes strongly but leaves too much to do

rankings.name: Latenightpass
key_positive_factors: Specialist in this discipline with course experience
Excellent jumping technique over varied obstacles
Proven form on the 'Good to Soft' surface
key_risks: Lower peak speed compared to the Grade 2 class switchers

rankings.name: Fakir D'Oudairies
key_positive_factors: Under the guidance of Cross Country master Enda Bolger
Highest base class in the field (Multiple G1 winner)
Strategic entry for this specific race
key_risks: Recent form (3-426) suggests a slight decline from peak RPR

rankings.name: Pied Piper
key_positive_factors: High-cruising speed from hurdle background
Gordon Elliott's second-string runners often outperform market expectations
Recent win boosts confidence
key_risks: Stamina concerns over the marathon Cross Country distance

rankings.name: Final Orders
key_positive_factors: Exceptional consistency (41-22)
Effective jumper who rarely makes errors
key_risks: May lack the 'X-factor' required to beat the high-OR stayers

rankings.name: Conflated
key_positive_factors: Massive OR of 162 makes him theoretically the best horse
Jack Kennedy opting for Favori leaves Danny Gilligan with a point to prove
key_risks: Carrying top weight in a grueling race

rankings.name: Desertmore House
key_positive_factors: Trained by Martin Brassil who excels in target training
Stamina is a proven asset
key_risks: Lacks the tactical speed of the favorites

rankings.name: The Goffer
key_positive_factors: Experienced handicap campaigner
Strong amateur jockey booking for the Elliott yard
key_risks: Exposed profile with limited scope for further improvement

rankings.name: Velvet Elvis
key_positive_factors: Recent form (123) shows upward trend in RPR
Good ground conditions suit his action
key_risks: Step up in class is significant

rankings.name: Horantzau D'airy
key_positive_factors: Reliable jumper
Low weight

rankings.name: Minella Crooner
key_positive_factors: Stablemate of the favorite
Has shown glimpses of high-class form in the past

rankings.name: Famous Bridge
key_positive_factors: Strong stayer in northern circuits
key_risks: Major step up in intensity and quality

pace_analysis.insight: The specialized nature of the Cross Country course usually dictates a measured early tempo, which will play into the hands of high-class stayers like Favori De Champdou and Vanillier as they transition into the race's final phase.
